headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on TKO Group Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $222
summary: JP Morgan  analyst David Karnovsky   maintains TKO Group Holdings (NYSE:TKO) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $225 to $222.
